# run

Run a FetchXML or SQL query against Dataverse.

## Usage

```
ppds query run [options]
```

## Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `query` | yes | Query text or path to a .xml/.sql file. |

## Options

| Long | Short | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--top` | `-t` | `int` |  | Limit the number of rows returned. |
